name: mcs-lab-auditor
description: Audit AND interactively build Microsoft Copilot Studio labs (any event/workshop, not just bootcamp) end-to-end via Playwright. Audit mode compares live UI to written instructions and posts fingerprint-deduped findings + fix PRs. Build mode authors a new lab step-by-step with screenshots, gates it through the audit engine, and opens a PR adding the lab to mcs-labs.
